title: Russia Oil Tanker Bound For China Makes U-Turn. Now, Heading To India
summary_full: At least 7 tankers carrying Russian oil have switched their destinations mid-voyage from China to India.
summary_public: At least 7 tankers carrying Russian oil have switched their destinations mid-voyage from China to India.

RU.label: neutral
